_comment: RULESET: Feature branch safety net
HOW TO IMPORT:
GitHub → Settings → Rules → Rulesets → ▼ New ruleset → Import a ruleset
Upload this file.
WHAT THIS ENFORCES (on feature/* branches):
• No force pushes — prevents accidentally overwriting a teammate's work.
Developers can still 'git push --force-with-lease' on their OWN branch
because Write-role users are in the bypass list with 'always' mode.
If you want to completely block force pushes even for developers,
remove the bypass_actors block.
WHAT THIS DOES NOT DO:
• Does NOT block direct pushes — devs must be free to push to their feature
branches without opening a PR every time.
• Does NOT require CI to pass on feature branches — CI only gates the PR
into main (that is handled by protect-main.json).
• Does NOT block branch deletion — devs should be able to clean up their
own branches after merge.
BYPASS ACTORS:
Write role (actor_id 3), always mode — any collaborator with write access
can force-push their own feature branches (e.g. after an interactive rebase).
Admin role (actor_id 5) also bypasses as a superset.
BRANCH PATTERN:
'refs/heads/feature/**' matches:
feature/add-product-page
feature/TICKET-123/fix-auth
feature/ayush/new-webhook
To also cover 'fix/', 'chore/', 'hotfix/' etc., add more patterns to
the 'include' array, e.g. 'refs/heads/fix/**', 'refs/heads/hotfix/**'.
name: Feature branch safety
